---
title: "Software visualization in three dimensions: A Survey"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2007-04-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Student Research Conference 2007 - 3rd IIT.SRC"
  publisher: "STU v Bratislave FIIT"
  isbn: "978-80-227-2631-3"
  page: "285-292"
---
